title: High Noon
author: Carl Foreman (Film)
content: “I've been frustrated, I've been hunted, I've been lied to, but I've never been scared.”

title: Unforgiven
author: David Webb Peoples (Film)
content: “It's a hell of a thing, killing a man. Take away all he's got and all he's ever gonna have.”
action: Understand the finality of your decisions.

title: Shane
author: Jack Schaefer
content: “A man has to be what he is, Shane. He can't break the mold.”
action: Accept your own nature and constraints.

title: The Searchers
author: Alan Le May
content: “Some men carry the weight of the world on their shoulders; others just carry it in their hearts.”
action: Manage the emotional load of your duties.

title: Tombstone
author: Kevin Jarre (Film)
action: Stand ready to address the challenge.
